items.title: cloudflare-api
items.why: Any task that needs to read or change Cloudflare state for Simon's domains (DNS, WAF, Workers, etc.)

items.title: find_or_build_capability
items.why: Whenever a task requires functionality not already wired up — apply BEFORE asking the user for help.

items.title: shell
items.why: Run bash/pwsh/cmd commands — scripts, process state, file listing, git/gh/npm/python/node CLIs.

items.title: read_file
items.why: Read a UTF-8 text file by absolute or relative path.

items.title: write_file
items.why: Write a UTF-8 text file; overwrite or append mode; restricted to allowed paths.

items.title: http_get
items.why: GET a URL and return raw text body — for JSON APIs, RSS feeds, plain docs.

items.title: browser_fetch
items.why: Fetch a web page and return reading-grade text (HTML stripped) — better than http_get for articles/docs.

items.title: browser_search
items.why: Web search via Brave Search API — returns top organic results with title/url/description.

items.title: delegate_claude
items.why: Spawn a Claude Code subagent for multi-file edits, test suites, or iterative coding tasks.

items.title: delegate_codex
items.why: Spawn a Codex CLI subagent — alternative coding agent or second opinion when Claude Code is busy.

items.title: list_skills
items.why: List all available skills (name + when_to_use) to discover loaded playbooks.

items.title: load_skill
items.why: Return the full body of a named skill so Larry can follow its instructions.

items.title: web-search.js
items.why: Multi-source web search (Brave > DDG > SearXNG) — returns top results as text or JSON.

items.title: deepseek.js
items.why: DeepSeek V4 red-team / debias / deep reasoner — flash, pro, and pro-thinking variants with --critique gate.

items.title: puter-search.js
items.why: Free Perplexity-style search via Puter — CREDITS EXHAUSTED, kept for reference.

items.title: screenshot_and_send.js
items.why: Capture a screenshot of a URL and send it (used to verify live deploys).

items.title: telegram-send.js
items.why: Cron-safe Telegram message sender — reads bot creds from encrypted vault, truncates at 4096 chars.

items.title: ollama-watchdog.js
items.why: Check and auto-heal Ollama — status report, incident history, and crash pattern tracking.

items.title: openclaw-watchdog.js
items.why: Check and auto-heal OpenClaw gateway — status report and crash pattern tracking.

items.title: deep-dive.js
items.why: Dump an entire module's files into one long-context LLM turn for strategic reviews and cross-file synthesis.

items.title: triage-router.js
items.why: Small-model (Qwen 2.5 2B) pre-filter for coin-flip / classifier / triage tasks before hitting Sonnet.

items.title: toon.js
items.why: TOON encoder/decoder — compact JSON alternative for structured LLM payloads (claims 30-60% token reduction).

items.title: claude
items.why: Claude Code CLI (Max flat-rate) — default for ALL non-trivial coding: features, refactors, multi-file edits, reviews.

items.title: codex
items.why: Codex CLI — alternative coding agent when Claude Code is busy or a second opinion is needed (paid per use).

items.title: anthropic / claude-sonnet-4-6
items.why: Primary provider — tool-calling support required for all agentic tasks; user-facing replies and orchestration.

items.title: openai / gpt-5.5
items.why: Fallback provider — used when Anthropic is unavailable; no tool-calling in current Larry build.

items.title: deepseek / deepseek-chat
items.why: Mandatory red-team/debias step for strategic research; V4 Pro is ~7x cheaper than Sonnet for batch reasoning.

items.title: ollama / qwen3.6:27b
items.why: Free local inference on RTX 4060 Ti — routine execution, data transforms, classification, summarization.
